Class Species

java.lang.Object
Species
Direct Known Subclasses:
Diprotodon, Genyornis, Megalania, Procoptodon, Thylacoleo, UnknownSpecies, Wonambi
public abstract class Species extends Object
Abstract Species class represents a megafauna species in the safari simulation. It stores the name of the species and declares abstract methods for type, diet, predator status, and aggression level to be implemented by each concrete subclass.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    Species()
    Default constructor initializes a Species object with default values.
    Species(String name)
    Parameterized constructor initializes a Species object with species name.
